dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "We can take him down, Iqra. I've been watching Hadi's racing schedule, we know exactly when and where he'll be."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.line: "But are we sure he's the one we want? What if he's not as weak as he seems?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, eyes gleaming with determination.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "He's our only chance at redemption, Iqra. We can't let him get away."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, her eyes narrowing in skepticism.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "Hey, guys, I couldn't help but overhear. Why don't we settle this like men, in the upcoming annual car race?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAMMAD, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "You think you're funny, don't you, Hammad? Trying to turn this into some joke."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of HAMMAD, his smile confident and inviting.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "Not at all, my friend. I just think it's time we put our skills to the test."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his eyes flashing with anger.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "Come on, baby, just a little more power..."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "I can do this. I have to do this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI, his eyes fixed on the engine.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "Let's show him what we're made of, Iqra!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the starting line, the cars a blur of color and light.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.line: "You got this, Haider. We're in this together."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, his eyes blazing with competitiveness.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "What the...? How did he do that?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI, his hands gripping the wheel tightly.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the finish line, HADI's car a triumphant conqueror of the track.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "Thanks, Haider. But it's not over yet."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his face a mask of respect.
